title: Climate Control
description: A Forge mod that adds a block and some items allowing you to control the weather.
body:
# **Climate Control** This Forge mod adds a block and some items used to control the weather. To control the weather you must craft a Weather Beacon and manipulate it with different weather gems explained ahead. ### **Weather Beacon** ![Weather Beacon Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/3e4a10a7a6e28f9383f3d07c42dd80e67d567c26.png)
Right click with Clear Gem, Rain Gem, Thunderstorm Gem and Snow Gem to use. ### **Clear Gem** ![Clear Gem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/c96d1b03013a96c9d742877efc81c80bed725216.png)
When used in Weather Beacon, turns the weather to clear. ### **Rain Gem** ![Rain Gem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/2927ab4d2075d560e2f8d3832c952987d785e13a.png)
When used in Weather Beacon, turns the weather to rainy. ### **Thunderstorm Gem** ![Thunderstorm Gem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/a1162063c7e1d9b12181dddd4909e277aea0b3d0.png)
When used in Weather Beacon, turns the weather to thunder. ### **Snow Gem** ![Snow Gem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/2361239286cf1bfb9514ecd2184d4e036bc296dc.png)
When used in Weather Beacon, turns the weather to snowy, depending on the biome temperature ### **Empty Weather Gem** ![Empty Weather Gem Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/kebKaoYS/images/9d9cb34eb714c42897b322b3d442d530aaf94f65.png)
Used to craft every weather gem. Enjoy the mod and make suggestions here: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4 By RoCris
